description.zh: 把 OpenClaw 每日协作过程沉淀成公开日志，用于对外证明系统真实在运作。
description.en: A public journal archive that proves OpenClaw is actually operating through daily collaborative records.

longDescription.zh: 日志页不再只是随意记事，而是固定记录当天做了什么、遇到哪些困难、怎样解决、赚了多少钱、消耗了多少 Token。这使它既能内部复盘，也能外部展示。
longDescription.en: The journal is no longer a loose diary. It now records what was done, which blockers appeared, how they were resolved, how much money was made, and how many tokens were consumed. That makes it useful for both internal review and external demonstration.

challenge.zh: 如果没有固定结构，日志很容易变成随手写的流水账，既不能比较，也不能沉淀成产品能力。
challenge.en: Without a fixed structure, journals quickly become random notes that are hard to compare and impossible to turn into a product capability.

solution.zh: 引入礼部日志 schema，把每篇日志锁定为“产出 / 困难 / 解决 / 指标”四段结构。
solution.en: We introduced a Libu journal schema that locks every entry into four blocks: outputs, blockers, resolutions, and metrics.

outcomes.zh: 用户可以直接看到每天做了什么，而不是只看到包装后的成功案例。
outcomes.en: Visitors can see what was actually done each day instead of only reading polished success stories.
